message:
fix: add pull-rebase retry to leaderboard workflow push step (#1540)

The workflow failed because a concurrent commit landed on main while the
leaderboard generation was running (~7 min). The bare 'git push' was
rejected with 'fetch first'. Add git pull --rebase before push with up
to 3 retries to handle this race condition.

Fixes #1539

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -53,7 +53,12 @@ jobs:
           git add public/data/leaderboard.json public/data/contributors/
           git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" && exit 0
           git commit -m "chore: update leaderboard and contributor profile data"
-          git push
+          MAX_RETRIES=3
+          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
+            git pull --rebase origin main && git push && break
+            echo "Push attempt $i failed, retrying..."
+            sleep 2
+          done
 
       - name: Create issue on failure
         if: failure()
